dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8144 IH: Quality Broadband for Connected Communities Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. McClain Delaney (for herself and Mr. Bresnahan) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture, and in addition to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned

form.official-title: To increase the minimum broadband service capacity for projects under the Community Connect Grant Program, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Quality Broadband for Connected Communities Act.

section.header: Increase in minimum broadband service capacity for projects under the Community Connect Grant Program
section.text: Section 604(a)(2) of the Rural Electrification Act of 1936 (7 U.S.C. 950bb–3(a)(2)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (A), by striking 10-Mbps and inserting 25-Mbps; and
in subparagraph (B), by striking 1-Mbps and inserting 3-Mbps.

section.text: The amendments made by this Act shall take effect 6 months after the date of the enactment of this Act.
